product.name: Trail Master Hiking Boots
product.description: Premium waterproof boots with ankle support. Perfect for Blue Mountain trails. Gore-Tex lining keeps feet dry in all conditions.
product.alt: Trail Master hiking boots — brown leather waterproof footwear

product.name: Explorer 4-Person Tent
product.description: Spacious weatherproof tent with easy 5-minute setup. Double-walled design with UV protection. Great for weekend camping trips.
product.alt: Explorer 4-person dome tent set up on a grassy campsite

product.name: Adventure Pro Backpack 45L
product.description: 45L capacity with multiple compartments, padded hip belt, and hydration system compatibility. Rain cover included.
product.alt: Adventure Pro backpack in orange — 45 litre hiking pack

product.name: Comfort Sleep Bag
product.description: Lightweight sleeping bag rated for tropical nights (15°C+). Compact and easy to pack into included compression sack.
product.alt: Blue Comfort sleeping bag unrolled on a campsite

product.name: Trekking Poles (Pair)
product.description: Adjustable aluminum poles with anti-shock system. Reduce strain on knees on steep descents. Includes carrying bag.
product.alt: Pair of silver aluminium trekking poles with rubber tips

product.name: Hydration Bottle 1L
product.description: Insulated stainless steel bottle. Keeps drinks cold for 24 hours, hot for 12 hours. Wide mouth for easy filling and cleaning.
product.alt: Insulated stainless steel water bottle in forest green

product.name: LED Headlamp 500lm
product.description: Rechargeable 500-lumen headlamp with red night-vision mode and multiple brightness settings. IPX4 water resistant.
product.alt: Black LED headlamp with elastic head strap

product.name: Portable Camp Stove
product.description: Compact gas stove with windscreen. Boils 1L of water in under 4 minutes. Compatible with standard isobutane/propane canisters.
product.alt: Compact camping gas stove with blue flame on rocky surface

product.name: Trail First Aid Kit
product.description: Comprehensive 100-piece kit for outdoor emergencies. Includes blister treatment, elastic bandages, antiseptic wipes, and emergency whistle.
product.alt: Red first aid kit bag open showing medical supplies inside

product.name: Climbing Harness Pro
product.description: CE-certified full-body climbing harness with adjustable leg loops and padded waist belt. Suitable for sport and trad climbing.
product.alt: Orange and black climbing harness laid flat showing buckles

product.name: Camping Hammock
product.description: Lightweight nylon hammock with tree straps. Holds up to 150kg. Perfect for Jamaica's lush rainforest canopy experience.
product.alt: Colourful camping hammock strung between two palm trees

product.name: Waterproof Map Case
product.description: Clear waterproof map holder fits standard folded maps and smartphones. Includes neck cord and waist strap. Essential for trail navigation.
product.alt: Transparent waterproof map case showing a topographic map inside
